data.title: .test-index: duplicate entry for record-test-status.sh causes test gate ambiguity
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: Pre-existing duplicate entry for plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh in .test-index (lines 37 and 38). The diff updated one entry but the duplicate remains, which may cause test gate to process the same file twice.
File: .test-index
Category: hygiene
